name: NBFC status lifecycle — 8-state machine with transition guards

blocker.detail: drizzle-kit push --force ran for 5+ minutes with no progress output and was not retryable from this agent (sandbox shared DB; second invocation blocked by harness). nbfc_status_history needs to be created in sandbox before Playwright API tests can verify ACs. Code, schema, routes, and tests are committed; once the table exists in sandbox, run `npx playwright test --config=tests/e2e/nbfc-loop.config.ts --project=nbfc-api tests/e2e/nbfc/E-011_nbfc-status-lifecycle.api.spec.ts` to verify.
